titleStmt.title: SII 29.117: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 117. (A.R. No. B. 774 of 1962-63.) RAÑJŌLE-KHĒṆI, BIDAR TALUK & DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the right wall (outside) of the Hanumān temple.
This very much damaged record belongs to the reign period of Rāyamurāri Sovīdēva of Kalachūri family which ruled from the capital Kalyāṇa.

The record registers a gift of land, gardens and income from taxes for worship and offerings to the god Brahmēśvara, for the repairs of the temple and for feeding ascetics by śrīkaraṇa, and antahpura verggade, mahapasāyita Brahmadēva-daṇḍanāyaka after laving the feet of Chandrābharana-munīndra. The temple of Brahmēśvara seems to have been established at Ṟenjēṟu by Bāchidēvarasa, the mahāmaṇḍalēśvara. The record contains genealogical accounts of both Brahmadēva and Bāchidēvarasa and also of the preceptor Chandrābharaṇa-munīndra, the āchāry of Ṟenjēṟu Hejjēśvara temple. There is a reference to the construction of the temple of Hejjēśvara with pond and a shikhara over the temple by Hejjabhūpa, the Sindha chief.

The record is dated in the 2nd regnal year of the king Śaka 1091, Sarbbadhāri, uttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa. The cyclic year Sarbbadhāri occurred in Śaka 1090 corresponding to 1168 A.D., which happens to be the 2nd regnal year of king Sovidēva. uttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa occured on 25th December, Wednesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
(śrī) śrīma(dbha)drādi nānāsutana karmaṇi mauḷi(vri)lōjjammaracatvā pārccati bavaranibiḍa kubā vaṁśyasya ca
gri vraṇatraṁtrabhuvana (bhavaṇāri) śāśvatrīśvaryyanāgiddādi brahmaṁśvajavanakṣī sugama vanamaulyōmakāśaṁ mahā
tpālina nānāja ma kuṁbi kuṁbīna saprācchaditāduttuṁgattavaḷa takaraṁgābbi vidā viḷāsa
dvīpadāḷvaṁ kaḷādurati sakaḷadvīpa sā(mrājya) la(kṣmī)tiḷakaṁ tadvīpamadya dā ddā(ma) himācaḷēṁdraṁ ga
memabhū(varadaha)lakṣaṇa bhāgadāḷāḷpatittu tā taṁcaśatabhūtva ta
ṟepiṁda bhūmi(dē)kādavaṁge saṁbhacana vaḷaṁtrihaṁ sucaritra puṇyagāviḷeṟeva dhammarate varmane kuṁtaḷa poppū mahimā
kuṁtaḷa kalitricakramaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷana paṇutanēkacchatradi yaṁ pāḷisida nijaprabhaḷaṁ nāyā
nbhāvajaḥ bahitasyāta catussamudrataṭi niśuṁbajjalaṁ bijjalaṁ . tōṟena mātugaḷdu I caḷudigeyaṁ goṁḍāvi
(rāgi) bhūbhuja sēnayugadavagaṁḍage camu(ṁ) (ca) mukaḷadi ḷisi pāpa (vina) bāṟe
naṁ kali pracaṁḍanaṁ . baladiṁdaṁ suvādāgādhavavenisade tāyurādataṁ bijala magana (ka)ḷa dikpāḷa
ḷakhaḷa diśācaṁda madaṁḍaṁgada nacāvipra vimaḷajaḷāsvāda brige praṇītaṁ . samā paramaydā
yāḷa vijageya yuṁ manittu Uttuveṁdu benisida sinaṁtthāḷdiyuṁ ni tu krama (daḻka)lāḍa bāḍanaḍavemāṇa sama(saṁ)
vaṁ binaṁ manā tmaṁ kīrtti taṁ (kaṁ) tiḷaka vija dāḷaṁ . jaladhātri tanūjanāgi vēma
da nādaṁtavaṇi janāśrita(ciṁ)tāmaṇi sakaḷa (kalā)madi sōma . parivāraṁ ñajavāra paritāpamataḷāvinaṁ vājadayaṁ cēti
dāḷa ja daṁbikaṁ taḷadānaṁ maryyāde (vibhu)dhātri susthi tiya nāvagaṁ taḷavina khyati viśaṁ bhūcaḷi mayūña bhujāgradāda
bhū pāḷakaṁ . naḷa māṁdhārtta pa naṁdanahuṣā gatuhita kadāḷana dōśadoḷu vibhava viṇā ryya vidaryya vicala
hāsa saṁnaguṇa mayya vila nitā vaḍaṁ bhūpana . bhūpāḷaṁ sudādite gāmanō vallabhaṁ
paṭṭamādēviyanirppa bhuvabhāsiya dēvitamāda dēviya(ra)jesaṁ tipa yuva kaḷāva saubhāgyavare viḷāsa ti saḷa
vati lāvaṇyavatiyene taḷadaḷese Ava ṟadaviyaṟe yanenuta yā re viṟane (bi)gutirppa
va śakaḷā kaḷāpavāga na bhūpatidēvigā śīḷajaḷa mādādēvaru sōma(ru)pa satibhāṟanaśāḻige
dā variḷāpa(ma)himā vi dōtavadita kamaḷāpava(pri)ya (sēvrā)va(ha) (ta) samastasadbhāvasuta(ṁ)
bhaja dāḷaṁ navāliṁda śōvaṇṇa haravisalisērtikali ku hemmāḍi dā (taṁ) ṇiṁ negaḷdādātaladē vāṇiya samasta prājyusu
pūrṇacaṁdranene nā maṁtradiṁtāne mauḻiga salisa ta yiṁ (varāḷi paṁ) samānaguṇāḷaṁkri tana pōtarkya pā
madaṁ vārehinēkadiraṁga trage vesale harmmasivēgaṁ savidelavida śōḷvididāyata sucanita vasudivyavāda pakādāvargge
sidataṟurū pudi ṇamābāṁbikā de ge sidaṁ bharmadiṁdādinātha . Abhimā(na) dānaśīḷa nayavi
jā viḷāsaṇa śutaladvīḻasaṁdapaṁ diśaṁbhādvayadayi(ṁ) kōttamaṁ dēva prabhugaṁ bāhu dava
bhūpāḷa putranōdiśiṁtā sadana niyama vānaḷa
litanē phaḷanaṁ vippsudivatadagraṁ tirāśi vaṁśōdbhavaṁ Aḍavi rājyada kavatuhanakāvaṁbaḷi
nenetōsaṟū najagadāda bhū kāvyagelanākṣa kāvya pra vālaṁ dēva Āsōyinirmaḷa kāvyaṁ(buda)
du budavarakṣi svīmāṁtaṁ tadāṁvalage vipraṁ bāḷudānati gaṭṭa gavakāśa padaḷuveṁ gu
neśau caṁ pālavile (sa)cayā śutusalatāyuṁ taṁ(tā)mūṟuvigōphala ya kalki kula ma(ṁ)tri nārādhyaḍappaṁdadamā valadēvagraphaḷa
(ti)ḷaka śrī baṁ daṁḍādhipaṁ phalavastutiyi pādava (ga) dāḷana sāvaṁdānala dēviya maṁtri(maṁ)ḍanavi
saṁ . haḍiyoḍadāda pa baḷalipuvalidana kā ḷāka darā maṁdākila dēviya maṁtri mādana baṁmarasaṁ . Antenipā sarvada
kāṁtana nijajanma bhū miṇaḻeṁjeṟadu ṁtadaḷipuda kāṁbanda bhadra di vīraṁ bhūdēva mārthakatthanavakā(ya)
bhūdēvi maṇi kaṭikaṁ bhūdēvi kaḷādēvi sya vidunārāsīna pudrikṣudādidinudyana
ḷiṁ kaḷama(kā)dā kaṁgaḷiṁ kūḍidīmuttuṁga śivālaya bhatadi radāśava mavayādyakāra śāvāsyadaṁ
(vā)ḍa vistāravaṁ tiḷiḷāḷadiṁ latayilathikāgri nataśukadiṁ ka diṁdesedirppā bhūradiṁ tiḷaka bhājatā
ḷalāṁ didanaṁdanabriṁda (daḍa)gataḷa kāvanataraṁ disavaha ḷanādudāṁvahā purajisuvaththanāda vāriṇi kāṁtanati prabhā
pa kāḷāpa kuḷā(pa)ggēṁdracaṁdra dharaṇīprabhu pratimati talavīraṁ danugoppa baṁpuvadiṁdaṁ subhadagranera hajjabhū bhu
tanavimaḷvānvayamānabhūpaṁ siṁdhavaṁśavāṁśange(du)rtādu . mahāpuṇīśvaraṁ mātta . Adaṁ tējōṇa bhōgavati
dāḷdu saṁbhōga sudānaṁdadiṁda vatiyuṁ saṁbhavaṁ . patisahitavormepadavati siṁdhu
gavaḷu siṁmanaṁ dēviśrutajaḷakaḷiyāḷidā satitapanaṁ taradātōdayara vilasi kaṁḍaḷa na nastutayisiṁ niṁna
ṁ janiyi koḍataneyeṁ ha prabhanene lavane ḍitakavijana nijjana tamā . neya śārapādidanivaṁ dharaṇīpatiya kuvaṁṭada
nippasidāgiya taṁṇaḷalāḷu nilisidāpā bhōgaṁ vepuniṁbaduṁtina voleya dana ḷuḍe nōḍidaḍanudura bhuja didisame
purōttama nitya pārakaṁ . citravidadaṁ gaḷa bhācakradōpragi paḍelā bāḷakanaṁ dhātridaveyaṁgada pātrānaka ninadaśa selayataṁ
(nisidatu) . Aṁtukari bayaḷinadāḷu vidataya Ā vvana nirpudu māraṁge nādala nripati mayūravarmma (saṁbana) magaḷaṁ (caḍiki)
vaṁ nivākali saṁghātaniggaḷagaṁṇana davāyvuḷuṁ menepelakṣmī teya nattā yāḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadi
ppa matanayaṇātvajaniya sa(ṁ)dharssatya banāprabhu naṭṭanetā bivasa(buṇā)
varāga taraṇa lōmaga(rā)ja praṇīta nagvijaya keḷagadaddu saṁta sutāgraṇigaḷu bhūpādada ḍamā
maṇigaḷu vātanahāga nāthasavā paḷiyaṁ dānā dranapya budhasabya nināpra(bhō) sēbyaniṁdaṁda kāḷada veṁbuṁbu
tāḷakoṁḍa nripāgraṇi satyanibyaviṁdaḷi nelakvānāḍugaḷa ma va kāḷage jagatsavyaṁ budhasu
ḷanaṭṭada nāḍiṁ gavanīśanāda ki(ri)vala caṁpūlitadula caṁdra llabhai vasaṁta vanadoḷeseva hajjabhūpāḷa
geyvadagiṁta reṁjāṟu tājavānisaṟeṁna . varayādviśvāyuṁ vīra hajja bhūpāḷajaṁ kathamaśavaṁ reṁjēṟupitāma
dāta nijavimaḷākhyātiṁ (vṛṁdārkka tāraṁbara) ttuṁga maṁkūḍa hajjēśvara dēvāgāra maṁmā
ḍisidiṭa narupamaṁ siṁda vaṁśāvatanuṁ . vasavatyanata dadāḷa mada sarōvaramaṁ kaṭṭisidaṁ sthirataravana māḍi
di mu managanāvāḍi . viṁ nidhidoḷunāḷdaḻva ku suttalu kūḍāviniśtaḷa sīmā kritiviḷa
tuṁga gōparaṁ gayisuguṁ . Ā (hajjabhūpāḷa kana]vanaṁ suta vīrapammagadideyanthātana
Asavasika ra tthanujaṁ hēmaṁtritaḷapati jayaśrī vadhūmandōnara
bācedēvaṁ negaḷa negaḷdurutkraṣṭa sindā ya ḷa hejjēśvara (nṟi)pāḷa puradāḷāppā
di brahmēśvara pratiṣṭhāthiya susthiravāgi divasa mitiyanthā nāda
neyara taṇilaṟuṁbaṟāḷu saṁdādi brahmaśa nāmādi jayaṁ vīra bisaṟāpamaṣaktai rida jaga
dindra maṁ paṇudāsiraththarasanā nidhaisitaṁ basavapana rirggema śiddarggava
brāṇarggi (kali)nāgaḷa vida kadātiḻarṇṇ maṁ svarṇṇa
yāga pratiliśvayamāḍi . viraḷa sarāvādri nitya pravaca ṁdini
taḷādudbhatpuṇya(maṁ)jiṁ puṭṭidā dāviśva puḷa sōya sa
gāvaghāta sthaḷa pāḷaprajvāḷi māsa savinegaṁ māḍida brahmadēva (su)sthira venelādi (brahmādi)
dēvāgāramaṁ vinirmisi dāpuradā ḷugaṁ śrī brahmatīrthamaṁ vīra lā . va . Ā ma
sāsiyuramaṁ vaiśaṁpāḷāyana sarasiyuma da nikṣēpaṁ banōdaṁ gāṇvinōdaṁ sāpinoḷabrahma
tavanādavagādaṁ . Anupamara dvadāgriha saratnācaturanita vottharaṁ vinūta vanava māḍisi taṭiya samira pada
dyagāra pāvana vanamaṁ sa(rō)vara manōppuvesadisi jaḷa Appu puṇyabhāra jasavene baṁmadēva vibhuṁ nirmmaḷa
kāda Ānanda narasaṁ dinānāthaṁ nilpa nandiga nthiṇpine bhūtaḷaṁ nilvinavaṁ bhārā śiragaḷneśvanavama(ra)na
dalvināśrītabhavaṁ nilpinamiśaṁ nītvrabhuṁvākṣa gaḷnilviṁlōnadāḷa dhammanivāsaṁ bammadēvaṁ vi
dharmmaṁ salutakanibbhaṁ sadalegittaluvāra laṁḍupurakāḷasavasava sōmēśvara sthānadājārya
vennegaḻdaravara kāṣyaṁ Asubavēśa sukīdha gurudāsatāḻadākābhuva nayariga pratāpa saṁdrage Ācaṁdrā bharaṇaṁ
śruta sahita gaṇyanu tkṛṣṭapuṇyaṁ . yamaniyama balidanintu yamaniyava pavitra nallanene tāḻdediruddhanā
yi Uttamanenisidana khiḷa caṁdrabhu ṇmuniya matanuta sātyāya dhyānadhāraṇa monānuṣṭhāṇa japa
vinnavappa ṟeṁjēṟa śrī hejjēśvara dēvasthānadācāryya caṁdrābharaṇa munīṁdrara kālaṁkarcci svasthisamasta praśasti sa
hituṁ śrīmadantarppura verggaḍe śrīkaraṇaṁ mahāpasāyitaṁ barṁmadēva daṇḍanāyaka samadhigata paṁcamahāmaṇḍaḻēśva
raṁ bācidēvarasara māgaduḍādupa śvarada (di) māḍi sakavarṣa 1091 neya
baṟa cakravarti rāyamurāri sōyidēva varṣada 2 neya sarbbadhāri duttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇadoḷu
śrī brahmēśvaradēvara sthāna gandhadhūpadīpa nivēdyādi tapodhanaraśanā bhōdhanakkekhaṇḍa sphuṭita jīrṇṇōdhārakke
śrīmanmahārājadhāni mūḍadolaṁdu siṁdha nārāyaṇa
ntada (riṁ) paḍuvalu neṭṭakallu baḍagalavara vāḍeya baṭṭiva hāḍulu hoḷeyaṁciṁda teṁkalu ṟaṁkaḷigeyaṟeholadava dēvavana
matttharu 10 koṁḍagasīme mūḍalu hajjēśvara dēvara huṇaseya tōṁṭa
sōvarasina tōṁṭa Ā banadiṁda paḍuvalu pūdōṁṭa 1 reṁjēṟa nāḍunagara gaḷaṁ biṭṭayaṁ bhattha hēṟeṁgemāna 10
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu nṛpāṇaṁ kālē kālē pālaniyō bhavadbhiḥ sarbbētā nbāvinaḥ pārtthi vēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācate rāmacaṁdra
rva su dhādatthāṁ rājabhiḥ sagarādhibiḥ ryasya yasya yadā bhūvi tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . svadattāṁ para
ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ Itinmita nāvanu rjji
damaged śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
